title: Software Developers
description: Research, design, and develop computer software systems

title: Data Scientists
description: Develop and implement algorithms and data models to analyze complex datasets

title: Web Developers
description: Design, create, and modify websites. Analyze user needs to implement website content

title: Database Administrators
description: Administer, test, and implement computer databases, applying knowledge of database management systems

title: Network Engineers
description: Design and implement computer and information networks, such as local area networks (LAN), wide area networks (WAN)

title: Cybersecurity Analysts
description: Plan, implement, upgrade, or monitor security measures for the protection of computer networks and information

title: DevOps Engineers
description: Design, build, and maintain automation pipelines and deployment systems

title: UI/UX Designers
description: Design graphical user interfaces and user experience layouts for web and mobile applications

title: Product Managers
description: Lead the product strategy, roadmap planning, and product lifecycle from start to finish

title: Machine Learning Engineers
description: Design and build machine learning systems, train models, and deploy AI pipelines
education: Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science
